events.title: Design a modern baseball player stats dashboard
events.description: Create a responsive dashboard that displays baseball player statistics including batting average, home runs, RBIs, and recent game performance. Include player profile card, stats table, and performance chart components.

versions.title: Design a modern baseball player stats dashboard
versions.description: Create a responsive dashboard that displays baseball player statistics including batting average, home runs, RBIs, and recent game performance. Include player profile card, stats table, and performance chart components.

events.title: 웹 기반 야구 게임
events.description: 시간에 맞춰서 스크린을 탭하면 날아오는 공에 박자에 맞춰서 배팅을 휘둘르는 게임이야. 점수는 홈런, 1~3루타, 스트라이크로 구분하고 기회는 3번 이야.
